title: Buulzai
description:
[Archived] Absolutely necessary performance mods and tweaks. No more superfluous mods!
Single player • mid-range hardware • mod compatibility.
body:
A base fabric modpack with the absolutely necessary performance mods.
Configured for single player and with mid-range hardware in mind. Think of 4threaded CPUs 😯

Currently supporting **ONLY** Fabric **1.21.1**

All included mods


- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by thosea - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/OVuFYfre) by FoundationGames - [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811 - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RaphiMC - [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/2ecVyZ49) by VidTu - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by jellysquid - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nmDcB62a) by embeddedt - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX - [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/KuNKN7d2) by Steveplays - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by jellysquid - [StutterFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/FimwF33K) by wisecase2

- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel **_(dependency)_** - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC _**(required)**_ - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector - [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox _**(ModMenu dependency)**_


Older versions include: - [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sk9rgfiA) by embeddedt - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/Orvt0mRa) by comp500 - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese - [Yeetus Experimentus](https://modrinth.com/mod/HaaH232J) by Sunekaer



📢 You can also check Beauté Modpack!

⛈️ Vanilla modpack with emphasis on visual enhancements and particles ✨
Includes all tweaks from 🎯 Buulzai pack.



Disclaimer:

EntityCulling's configuration options
are from HyperSoop's modpack Simply Optimized.

* All rights reserved to their respective owners as defined by them on their project pages.
